[Previous Feedback] Correct! A and E are both valid — they use the full datetime format with a T separator and explicit +08:00 timezone offset.

Please update day01/sprint_tasks.json by filling in the created_at field for all tasks that currently have it empty. Use the sprint start time this morning (09:00) as the creation time for all tasks.
